The '''Cutlass-9 patrol fighter''', also known as the '''SoroSuub patrol fighter''', was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Design==
Twelve [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length, the Cutlass-9 was designed to protect SoroSuub Corporation interests in the [[Sullust system/Legends|Sullust system]] and across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was armed with twin [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and a [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion-missile]] launcher.

==History==
[[File:Spiraldraw3.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A Cutlass-9 patrol fighter]]
During the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] received one such ship from a group of [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] diplomats he had rescued from [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]]. He modified the ship far beyond its standard configuration and named it ''[[Sharp Spiral]]''.

The fighter was originally intended solely for [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub's]] own defense forces, but the corporation also supplied large quantities of the fighters to its [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] allies during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After the war, the design became common among planetary defense forces and pirate bands.<ref name="MOTPQ" />

While production ceased after the Clone Wars, it resumed when Sorosuub began covertly aiding the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="MOTPQ" /><ref name="SOR" />

When [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] seceded from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and joined the Alliance to Restore the Republic, these vessels became part of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]]. Cutlass-9 starfighters continued to serve in the fleets of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Legacy==
The design of the [[Fury-class starfighter]] used by the [[One Sith]] was based on the Cutlass-9 patrol fighter.<ref name="LECG">''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
